name: Miracle Road
explicitMods: +46% to Fire Resistance
26% increased Movement Speed
100% chance to Avoid being Chilled
10% chance to gain Onslaught for 4 seconds on Kill
19% chance to gain Elusive on Critical Strike
10% increased Attack, Cast and Movement Speed while you have Onslaught
10% increased Elusive Effect
24% increased Effect of Tailwind on you
You have Tailwind if you have dealt a Critical Strike Recently

socketedItems.secDescrText: While this skill is active, supported spells will be repeatedly triggered.
explicitMods: Each Supported Spell will Trigger when its Cooldown is over
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

explicitMods: Supported Spells are Triggered when their Cooldowns are over
hybrid.secDescrText: Supports spell skills that are instant and have no reservation. Cannot support Vaal skills or skills used by totems, traps or mines. Cannot modify the skills of minions.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Gain a buff that makes you faster, harder to detect, and grants Phasing, letting you pass through enemies. Performing any skill replaces this buff with one that boosts melee physical damage of skills you use yourself (it will not apply to your melee skills used by totems). Consumes Frenzy Charges to increase duration.
explicitMods: Base duration is 1.80 seconds
Base secondary duration is 0.20 seconds
30% more Melee Physical Damage
100% increased Skill Duration per Frenzy Charge removed
Buff grants 50% increased Movement Speed
Buff grants Phasing
Buff grants 100% increased Stealth
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Applies a buff which can take some of the damage from hits for you before being depleted. Shares a cooldown with other Guard skills.
explicitMods: Base duration is 1.50 seconds
10% increased Cooldown Recovery Rate
This Skill's Cooldown does not recover during its effect

70% of Damage from Hits is taken from the Buff before Life or Energy Shield
Buff can take 2209 Damage
Buff grants Immunity to Bleeding
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Supports any non-blessing skill. Minions cannot gain the Lifetap buff.

Gain Lifetap after Spending a total of 273 Life on Upfront

Supported Skills deal 19% more Damage while you have Lifetap
Lifetap lasts 4 seconds
socketedItems.descrText: This is a Support Gem. It does not grant a bonus to your character, but to skills in sockets connected to it. Place into an item socket connected to a socket containing the Skill Gem you wish to augment. Right click to remove from a socket.

name: Headhunter
explicitMods: +51 to Strength
+53 to Dexterity
+72 to maximum Life
30% increased Damage with Hits against Rare monsters
When you Kill a Rare monster, you gain its Modifiers for 60 seconds
flavourText: "A man's soul rules from a cavern of bone, learns and
judges through flesh-born windows. The heart is meat.
The head is where the Man is."
- Lavianga, Advisor to Kaom

name: The Golden Charlatan
enchantMods: Quality does not increase Physical Damage
Grants 1% increased Area of Effect per 4% Quality
explicitMods: +200 Intelligence Requirement
289% increased Physical Damage
15% increased Attack Speed
195% increased Critical Strike Chance
Critical Strikes with this Weapon do not deal extra Damage
Gain a random Shrine Buff for 30 seconds when you Kill a Rare or Unique Enemy
+1 to maximum Mana per 2 Intelligence
flavourText: "He speaks, he leads, he stands tall...
yet, what has he truly done, save
spill our blood in pursuit of power?"

flavourText: Immortality could grant Catarina the time necessary to shape
a better world... but building requires sacrifice, and the useless
would be crushed into the foundation of her new utopia.

flavourText: "True power grows with patience. You must nurture it.
You learn what it needs. You provide. You wait. Only
then, when it is ripe, does it yield its fruits."

name: Defiance of Destiny
explicitMods: +85 to maximum Life
+30% to Fire Resistance
+22% to Cold Resistance
+35% to Lightning Resistance

flavourText: The farmer was struck again and again, but he refused to stay down.
Astonished, the raiding warlord ordered the man's family spared.

name: Wine of the Prophet

for those that have the will, and the way!"
- High Templar Andronicus

socketedItems.secDescrText: Grants a buff providing fire damage based on your physical damage. While you have this buff, if you kill an enemy, other enemies near them will be burned based on the overkill damage. The burn inflicted by this skill can only be affected by modifiers to damage over time (burning damage is damage over time).
explicitMods: Base duration is 4.00 seconds
Base Burning Damage is 25% of Overkill Damage
40% more Burning Damage
Buff grants 21% of your Physical Damage as Extra Fire Damage
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Grants a buff which lets you deal more physical damage. The Sentinels of Purity have a single-target melee attack and an area melee attack.

Feasting and drinking of the milk of the mother,
they fought to the death for every last drop.

The consumer of our flesh. The seeder of our
souls unto the earth. We give the Gull his life.
The Gull gives us our Way."
- Lavianga, Advisor to Kaom

alongside her dekhara, but she was unstoppable
when she fought atop her trusted mount, Shiyo.
